diagrams.title: HTTP Request-Response Flow in Servlet Container
diagrams.description: Shows the flow from browser request through servlet container to servlet processing and response generation
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how requests flow through the servlet container and how request/response objects are created and used

diagrams.title: Forward vs Redirect Comparison
diagrams.description: Side-by-side comparison showing the difference between server-side forward and client-side redirect
diagrams.purpose: Clarify the technical difference between forward() and sendRedirect() for exam understanding

diagrams.title: HttpServletRequest Object Structure
diagrams.description: Shows the hierarchy and key methods grouped by category: parameters, headers, attributes, session
diagrams.purpose: Organize the many methods of HttpServletRequest into memorable categories
